payload.objective: Generate one local PDF inventory manifest script (best-effort reviewable attempt). Generate exactly one runnable local helper script artifact for a best-effort PDF extraction/conversion attempt using the provided parameters.

params.title: Generate one local PDF inventory manifest script (best-effort reviewable attempt)
params.description: Use ~/Desktop/pdf样本 as input. Create one runnable local Python script that scans PDF files and writes one deterministic reviewable manifest under artifacts/. Local-only. Do not...

constraints: Follow the local inbox normalized request
Do not claim unsupported runtime dependencies
Produce only the expected script artifact
Prefer honest, reviewable intermediate behavior over unsupported OCR claims

source.title: Generate one local PDF inventory manifest script (best-effort reviewable attempt)

acceptance_criteria: Produce the expected script artifact at expected_outputs[0].path
Script behavior remains runnable, deterministic, and reviewable

result.summary: Generated one deterministic local Python helper script artifact that scans PDFs from the configured input directory and writes a reviewable manifest to the configured .xlsx path using only standard-library behavior plus optional openpyxl if available, with a CSV fallback written at the same target path when XLSX support is unavailable.
notes: The script is best-effort and intentionally does not claim OCR or text extraction success without local evidence.
The script produces a deterministic PDF inventory manifest suitable for review.
If openpyxl is unavailable, the script writes CSV-formatted manifest data to the requested output path for reviewability rather than claiming real XLSX generation.
